# E2E Test Plan — Users Module (Stage 1, Phase 4B)

**Change ID**: `20260612-user-mgmt`
**Module**: `users`
**Generated by**: `aws-e2e-plan` (inline)
**Generated at**: 2026-06-12
**Source case file**: `qa/changes/20260612-user-mgmt/cases/users/case.yaml`
**Source fact baseline**: `qa/changes/20260612-user-mgmt/facts/fact-baseline.json`
**Reviewed dependencies**: `plans/api-plan.md`, `.aws/data-knowledge.yaml`

> **Stage gate**: This is a Stage 1 PLAN file. NO test code is written here. Codegen happens only after Phase 5B `e2e-plan-review.json` returns `decision=pass` and `codegen_readiness ∈ {ready, ready_with_warnings}`.

---

## 1. Scope

### 1.1 In-scope cases (E2E with `automation.required = true`)

| Case ID      | Title                                          | Priority | Tier      | Notes |
|--------------|------------------------------------------------|----------|-----------|-------|
| TC-USER-100  | 用户管理页 - 管理员登录后列表正常加载            | P0       | smoke     | E2E entry point |
| TC-USER-101  | 用户管理页 - 新建用户成功并出现在列表            | P0       | smoke     | Critical CRUD |
| TC-USER-102  | 用户管理页 - 编辑用户名持久化                    | P1       | regression | Persistence verify |
| TC-USER-103  | 用户管理页 - 给用户分配并保留角色                | P1       | regression | Cross-module + ORM verify |
| TC-USER-104  | 用户管理页 - 删除用户从列表移除                  | P0       | smoke     | Destructive flow + popconfirm |
| TC-USER-105  | 用户管理页 - 用户名搜索过滤生效                  | P2       | regression | **Needs Review** (P2 per skill rule) |

**Total**: 6 E2E cases, all targeting `/system/user` page.

### 1.2 Needs Review (priority gate)

- **TC-USER-105 (P2)**: Per `aws-e2e-plan` skill rule, P2 cases require explicit reviewer acknowledgement. User scope explicitly includes "全量 CRUD + 角色分配" + search exists in case.yaml; planning included for completeness. Reviewer to confirm or downgrade to skip-without-codegen.

### 1.3 Out-of-scope

- API-only cases (TC-USER-001..052) — covered by Phase 4A (`api-plan.md`)
- Disabled-state toggle (`is_active` switch) — not in case.yaml
- Department tree filter — not in case.yaml
- Login error paths — not in users module scope

## 2. Environment & Execution Contract

| Aspect              | Value                                                       | Source |
|---------------------|-------------------------------------------------------------|--------|
| Test framework      | `pytest-playwright` (Python, sync API)                      | data-knowledge.execution.e2e |
| Backend base URL    | `http://localhost:9999` (env `BASE_URL` overrides)          | `backend_base_url` fixture |
| Frontend base URL   | `http://localhost:3100` (env `E2E_FRONTEND_URL` overrides)  | `frontend_base_url` fixture |
| Login credentials   | `admin` / `123456` (default seeded superuser)               | `admin_credentials` fixture |
| Headed mode         | `--headed` (per project convention)                          | data-knowledge.execution.e2e.command |
| Timeout per test    | 60s (default), 90s for create/edit flows with form submits  | execution-policy |
| Concurrency         | Serial only (sqlite + UI state)                              | API plan parity |
| Browser engine      | Chromium (default Playwright) — browser stickiness via `logged_in_page` fixture |
| Storage state       | None (each function-scoped `logged_in_page` re-logs in)      | data-knowledge.auth.e2e.storage_state |

**Execution command** (Phase 8):
```bash
uv run pytest tests/e2e/test_users_e2e.py -v --headed
```

---

## 3. Authentication & Navigation Contract

### 3.1 Login flow (handled by `logged_in_page` fixture)

The fixture performs:
1. Navigate to `${frontend_base_url}/login`
2. Fill username `admin` and password `123456` into placeholder-matched inputs (`请输入用户名` / `请输入密码`)
3. Click login button (text `登录`)
4. **Wait for** `GET /api/v1/base/usermenu` response (this is the readiness signal)
5. Return the authenticated `Page` object positioned on the home/workbench

### 3.2 Navigation to `/system/user`

Two equally valid options. Plan **prefers Option A** (deterministic, decoupled from sidebar i18n/icons):

**Option A (preferred): direct URL**
```
page.goto(f"{frontend_base_url}/system/user")
page.wait_for_url("**/system/user")
page.wait_for_response(lambda r: "/api/v1/user/list" in r.url and r.ok)
```

**Option B (alternative): menu navigation**
- Click sidebar item containing text `系统管理` (NMenu collapse trigger)
- Click child item containing text `用户管理`
- Wait for URL match `**/system/user` and `/api/v1/user/list` response

**Decision**: Use Option A as the default. Each test reaches `/system/user` via direct goto inside an explicit `_navigate_to_user_page(page)` helper to keep test bodies focused on the assertion under test.

---

## 4. Selector Contract

### 4.1 Selector strategy (priority order)

1. **Role + accessible name**: `page.get_by_role("button", name="新建用户")` — preferred when stable
2. **Visible text**: `page.get_by_text("新建用户", exact=True)` — for header buttons / popconfirm body
3. **Placeholder**: `page.get_by_placeholder("请输入用户名称")` — for query inputs and modal inputs
4. **Label association**: `page.get_by_label("用户名称")` — for `NFormItem` paired controls
5. **Locator chaining**: `page.locator(".n-data-table-tbody tr").filter(has_text=username)` — for table-row scoped lookups
6. **CSS structural fallback**: only if 1–5 fail; document the rationale inline

> **Forbidden**: hardcoded random `naive-ui` generated class hashes (e.g. `.n-button--primary-type`). Prefer text/role/label.

### 4.2 Page element catalog (from `web/src/views/system/user/index.vue`)

| Logical element                         | Selector (recommended)                                        | Notes |
|-----------------------------------------|---------------------------------------------------------------|-------|
| Page title (CommonPage `title=用户列表`) | `page.get_by_text("用户列表", exact=True)`                      | header marker |
| "新建用户" button                        | `page.get_by_role("button", name="新建用户")`                  | top-right action |
| Query input — username                  | `page.get_by_placeholder("请输入用户名称")`                    | filter bar |
| Query input — email                     | `page.get_by_placeholder("请输入邮箱")`                        | filter bar |
| Query trigger (Enter key on input)      | `query_input.press("Enter")`                                   | per `@keypress.enter` |
| Modal — title                           | `page.get_by_text("新增 用户")` / `page.get_by_text("编辑 用户")` | from `useCRUD` modalTitle pattern |
| Modal — username input                  | `modal.get_by_placeholder("请输入用户名称")`                   | scope: modal |
| Modal — email input                     | `modal.get_by_placeholder("请输入邮箱")`                       | scope: modal |
| Modal — password input                  | `modal.get_by_placeholder("请输入密码")`                       | add-mode only |
| Modal — confirm password input          | `modal.get_by_placeholder("请确认密码")`                       | add-mode only |
| Modal — role checkbox                   | `modal.get_by_role("checkbox", name=role_name)`                | NCheckbox per role |
| Modal — Save button                     | `modal.get_by_role("button", name="确定")` (default `CrudModal` ok button) | per `CrudModal.vue` (verify in code; fallback `modal.locator(".n-button--primary-type").last()`) |
| Modal — Cancel button                   | `modal.get_by_role("button", name="取消")`                     |  |
| Table — body                            | `page.locator(".n-data-table-tbody")`                          | NDataTable convention |
| Table — row by username                 | `page.locator(".n-data-table-tbody tr", has_text=username)`    | row scoping |
| Row — Edit button                       | `row.get_by_role("button", name="编辑")`                       |  |
| Row — Delete button                     | `row.get_by_role("button", name="删除")`                       | triggers NPopconfirm |
| Delete popconfirm body                  | `page.get_by_text("确定删除该用户吗?")`                        | identifies popconfirm |
| Delete popconfirm — confirm             | popconfirm scope `get_by_role("button", name="确定")`          | Naive default text |
| Row — Reset password button             | `row.get_by_role("button", name="重置密码")`                   | not used in E2E plan but documented |
| Reset popconfirm body                   | `page.get_by_text("确定重置用户密码为123456吗?")`              |  |
| Reset success toast                     | `page.get_by_text("密码已成功重置为123456")`                   | NMessage |
| Generic success toast                   | `page.locator(".n-message").filter(has_text="成功")`           | for create/update/delete |

> **Selector confidence**: HIGH for placeholders + visible text (verified in `index.vue`); MEDIUM for popconfirm + modal save button text (`CrudModal.vue` not yet read — codegen MUST verify by reading `web/src/components/table/CrudModal.vue` before emitting selectors). Marked under §10 Needs Review.

---

## 5. Per-case test design

> **Naming convention**: `test_user_<scope>_<intent>` (snake_case). All tests reside in `tests/e2e/test_users_e2e.py`.

### 5.1 TC-USER-100 — page loads with table

**Function**: `test_user_page_loads_after_admin_login`

**Setup**:
- Fixture: `logged_in_page` (function scope), `frontend_base_url` (session)

**Flow**:
1. `_navigate_to_user_page(logged_in_page, frontend_base_url)`
2. Capture `page.url` and the table state

**Assertions**:
- `assert "/system/user" in page.url`
- `expect(page.get_by_text("用户列表")).to_be_visible()` (page title)
- `expect(page.locator(".n-data-table-tbody tr")).not_to_have_count(0)` — at least one row
- Header column markers visible: `expect(page.get_by_text("名称")).to_be_visible()`, `expect(page.get_by_text("邮箱")).to_be_visible()`, `expect(page.get_by_text("用户角色")).to_be_visible()`

**Cleanup**: none (read-only)

**Risks**: page title text may change on i18n; documented as low-risk (zh-only project).

---

### 5.2 TC-USER-101 — create user via modal

**Function**: `test_user_create_via_modal_appears_in_list`

**Setup**:
- Fixtures: `logged_in_page`, `frontend_base_url`, `e2e_api_client` (for cleanup), `cleanup_users` (registers IDs for teardown)
- Pre-step: discover one existing role name via `e2e_api_client` → `GET /api/v1/role/list?page=1&page_size=10` → pick first role's `name` (default seed: `管理员` or `普通用户`)
- Test data: `username=qa_e2e_create_<rand>`, `email=qa_e2e_create_<rand>@test.local`, `password=Test@1234`

**Flow**:
1. Navigate to user page
2. Click "新建用户" button → modal opens
3. Fill modal: username, email, password, confirm-password
4. Tick the role checkbox (scoped to modal) for the discovered role name
5. Click modal "确定" save button
6. `page.wait_for_response(r: "/api/v1/user/create" in r.url and r.request.method == "POST")` — verify backend ack
7. After modal closes, fill query bar with username and press Enter
8. Wait for `/api/v1/user/list` response

**Assertions**:
- Success toast: `expect(page.locator(".n-message").filter(has_text="成功")).to_be_visible(timeout=5_000)`
- Row in list: `expect(page.locator(".n-data-table-tbody tr").filter(has_text=username)).to_have_count(1)`

**Cleanup**:
- After UI flow, look up user ID via `e2e_api_client` → `GET /api/v1/user/list?username=<username>&page=1&page_size=10` → pick `data[0].id`
- Append ID to `cleanup_users` for session-scoped teardown OR call `delete_user(user_id)` immediately
- **Strategy**: register in `cleanup_users` (project convention)

---

### 5.3 TC-USER-102 — edit username persists

**Function**: `test_user_edit_username_persists_after_reload`

**Setup**:
- Fixtures: `logged_in_page`, `frontend_base_url`, `e2e_api_client`, `cleanup_users`
- Pre-create via API: username `qa_e2e_edit_src_<rand>`, email `<same prefix>@test.local`, password `Test@1234`, role_ids = first role from `/api/v1/role/list`
- Target rename: `qa_e2e_edit_dst_<rand>`

**Flow**:
1. Navigate to user page
2. Search for `qa_e2e_edit_src_<rand>` via query bar (Enter)
3. Wait for `/api/v1/user/list` response; locate row, click "编辑"
4. Wait for modal; edit-mode shows NO password fields (per template `v-if="modalAction === 'add'"`)
5. Clear username input; fill new username
6. Click "确定" → wait for `POST /api/v1/user/update` 200 response
7. Reload page (`page.reload()`) and re-search the new username
8. Open the row's edit modal again
9. Capture the username field's value

**Assertions**:
- After save: success toast visible
- After reload + search: row with new username visible (`to_have_count(1)`)
- Re-opened modal username input has `to_have_value(new_username)`
- Old username search returns empty: `expect(table_body.locator("tr")).to_have_count(0)` after second search

**Cleanup**: pre-created user ID registered in `cleanup_users`; final state has new username — teardown deletes by ID (ID stable across rename).

---

### 5.4 TC-USER-103 — assign role and persists

**Function**: `test_user_assign_role_persists_in_form_and_db`

**Setup**:
- Fixtures: `logged_in_page`, `frontend_base_url`, `e2e_api_client`, `cleanup_users`
- Target role name (from fact baseline): `普通用户` — guaranteed seeded role
- Pre-create user via API: `username=qa_e2e_role_<rand>`, **with empty `role_ids=[]`**, password `Test@1234`

**Flow**:
1. Navigate to user page; search for the test user; open Edit modal
2. Verify `普通用户` checkbox is unchecked initially: `expect(modal.get_by_role("checkbox", name="普通用户")).not_to_be_checked()`
3. Click `普通用户` checkbox to check it
4. Click "确定" → wait `POST /api/v1/user/update` 200
5. Re-search and re-open Edit modal
6. Inspect role checkbox state
7. Cross-verify via `e2e_api_client` → `GET /api/v1/user/get?user_id=<id>` → `data.roles[*].name`

**Assertions**:
- Re-opened modal: `expect(modal.get_by_role("checkbox", name="普通用户")).to_be_checked()`
- API verify: `普通用户` ∈ `[r["name"] for r in user_detail["data"]["roles"]]`

**Cleanup**: pre-created user ID registered in `cleanup_users`.

---

### 5.5 TC-USER-104 — delete user via popconfirm

**Function**: `test_user_delete_via_popconfirm_removes_from_list`

**Setup**:
- Fixtures: `logged_in_page`, `frontend_base_url`, `e2e_api_client`, `cleanup_users`
- Pre-create via API: username `qa_e2e_delete_<rand>`

**Flow**:
1. Navigate; search for username; locate row
2. Click row's "删除" button
3. Wait for popconfirm body: `expect(page.get_by_text("确定删除该用户吗?")).to_be_visible()`
4. Click popconfirm "确定" button (scoped within popconfirm popover)
5. Wait `DELETE /api/v1/user/delete` 200 response
6. Re-search the username
7. API cross-verify: `GET /api/v1/user/list?username=<username>` → empty list

**Assertions**:
- Success toast visible
- Re-search yields zero rows: `expect(table_body.locator("tr").filter(has_text=username)).to_have_count(0)`
- API verify: `data == []` for that username search

**Cleanup**: register ID in `cleanup_users` defensively (idempotent — `safe_delete_user` swallows 404).

---

### 5.6 TC-USER-105 — username search filter (P2 — Needs Review)

**Function**: `test_user_username_search_filters_list`

**Setup**:
- Fixtures: `logged_in_page`, `frontend_base_url`, `e2e_api_client`, `cleanup_users`
- Pre-create via API: username `qa_e2e_search_<rand>`

**Flow**:
1. Navigate to user page
2. Fill query bar username field with `qa_e2e_search_<rand>`; press Enter
3. Wait `/api/v1/user/list` response with `username=<value>` query param
4. Capture row count
5. Clear input (use `input.fill("")`); press Enter
6. Wait `/api/v1/user/list` response
7. Capture row count

**Assertions**:
- After targeted search: exactly 1 row visible matching the username
- After clear: more than 1 row visible AND `admin` row visible: `expect(page.locator(".n-data-table-tbody tr").filter(has_text="admin")).to_have_count(1)`

**Cleanup**: ID in `cleanup_users`.

**Reviewer note**: P2 — flagged for removal if reviewer prefers tighter scope. Currently included for parity with case.yaml.

---

## 6. Cross-cutting test infrastructure

### 6.1 Helper: `_navigate_to_user_page(page, frontend_base_url)`

```text
def _navigate_to_user_page(page, frontend_base_url):
    page.goto(f"{frontend_base_url}/system/user")
    page.wait_for_url("**/system/user")
    page.wait_for_response(lambda r: "/api/v1/user/list" in r.url and r.ok, timeout=10_000)
```

Lives in `tests/e2e/test_users_e2e.py` as a module-private helper (not a fixture — pure navigation, deterministic).

### 6.2 Helper: `_search_user_in_table(page, username)`

Encapsulates: clear query, fill username, press Enter, wait for `/api/v1/user/list` response.

### 6.3 Helper: `_open_modal_save_for_user(page, action="编辑", username)`

Locates row by username, clicks the action button, waits for modal title to contain `用户` and the form to be ready.

### 6.4 Reusable from data-knowledge

- `tests/e2e/scripts/user_data_setup.py` (existing, `confidence: high`):
  - `get_backend_base_url()`, `get_admin_credentials()`, `get_admin_token()`, `delete_user(user_id, token)`
- New helper to add (codegen): `create_user_via_api(token, username, email, password, role_ids=[])` — small wrapper, ~10 LoC, unblocks pre-conditions for TC-USER-102/103/104/105.

### 6.5 Naming + uniqueness

- All UI-created or pre-created usernames: prefix `qa_e2e_` + intent + 8-char hex suffix (e.g. `qa_e2e_create_a3b1c9d2`)
- Emails follow same prefix: `qa_e2e_<intent>_<hex>@test.local`
- Passwords: constant `Test@1234` (well-formed, satisfies any future complexity rules)
- Hex suffix sourced from `secrets.token_hex(4)` to avoid timestamp collision under serial execution

### 6.6 Cleanup architecture

- **Primary**: `cleanup_users` session-scoped list — collected IDs deleted in session teardown via `safe_delete_user`
- **Defensive**: each test, in a `try/finally`, also registers IDs immediately after API pre-create or after UI create + ID lookup
- **No autouse purge**: per API plan parity (avoid bulk cross-test deletion that could affect serialized order)

---

## 7. Wait & timing strategy

| Action                                | Wait strategy                                     | Timeout |
|---------------------------------------|---------------------------------------------------|---------|
| After login (handled by fixture)      | `wait_for_response("/api/v1/base/usermenu")`      | 15s |
| After page navigate                   | `wait_for_url` + `wait_for_response("/user/list")`| 10s |
| After query Enter                     | `wait_for_response("/user/list")`                 | 10s |
| After modal save (create)             | `wait_for_response("POST /user/create")`          | 10s |
| After modal save (update)             | `wait_for_response("POST /user/update")`          | 10s |
| After delete confirm                  | `wait_for_response("DELETE /user/delete")`        | 10s |
| Toast assertion                       | `expect(...).to_be_visible(timeout=5_000)`        | 5s |
| Modal close after save                | `expect(modal).not_to_be_visible(timeout=5_000)`  | 5s |

**Forbidden**: `time.sleep(...)` outside debug. Always use `wait_for_response` or `expect(...).to_*` auto-retry assertions.

---

## 8. Failure-mode budget

| Mode | Mitigation |
|---|---|
| Modal save button text != "确定" | Codegen MUST read `web/src/components/table/CrudModal.vue` and verify the OK button text/role. If different, update selector and emit codegen-time note. |
| `useCRUD` modal title format ("新增 用户" vs "新建 用户") | Codegen reads `web/src/composables/useCRUD.js` (or similar) to confirm title format. Fallback: locate modal by visibility, not title. |
| Naive `n-message` class differs across versions | Use `page.locator(".n-message")` family + `filter(has_text="成功")`; if zero hits, fall back to `page.get_by_text("成功", exact=False).first` |
| Role checkbox not in modal but in a portal | Naive `NCheckboxGroup` renders inline (verified in template). If portaled in future, scope from `modal_root.locator("xpath=ancestor::body//...")` is NOT used; codegen halts with TODO. |
| Sidebar/menu changed | Plan uses `goto` direct URL; menu navigation is documented but unused. |
| Backend slow on first navigate | Default 10s suffices; bump to 15s only after first failure, never preemptively. |
| Network race after popconfirm confirm | Always `wait_for_response("DELETE /user/delete")` before re-querying list. |

---

## 9. Coverage matrix

| Case ID      | Functional area | UI element exercised | API verification |
|--------------|-----------------|----------------------|------------------|
| TC-USER-100  | Page render     | Table, header, columns | `/user/list` GET |
| TC-USER-101  | Create (UI)     | "新建用户" button, modal form, role checkbox, save | `/user/create` POST + `/user/list` GET |
| TC-USER-102  | Update — name   | Edit button, modal username input, save | `/user/update` POST + `/user/list` GET + re-open modal |
| TC-USER-103  | Update — role   | Edit button, modal role checkbox, save | `/user/update` POST + `/user/get` GET cross-verify |
| TC-USER-104  | Delete + popconfirm | Delete button, NPopconfirm, confirm | `/user/delete` DELETE + `/user/list` GET |
| TC-USER-105  | Search filter   | Query username input, Enter | `/user/list?username=...` GET |

**Total UI surfaces covered**: page nav, table, query bar, modal create, modal edit (rename + role), popconfirm delete. **Reset password UI**: NOT covered by E2E (covered via API in TC-USER-050/051/052) — by design.

---

## 10. Needs Review (carry to reviewer)

- **NR-E2E-PLAN-001** (priority): TC-USER-105 is P2. Skill rule requires explicit reviewer ack. Recommendation: keep, low marginal cost. Blocking: false.
- **NR-E2E-PLAN-002** (selector verification): Modal save button text/role is *assumed* to be "确定" based on Naive UI default + `CrudModal.vue` not yet read. Codegen MUST read `web/src/components/table/CrudModal.vue` and confirm — this is a codegen-time gate, not a planning-time blocker. Blocking: false.
- **NR-E2E-PLAN-003** (selector verification): Modal title format ("新增 用户" / "编辑 用户") assumed from `useCRUD` convention. Codegen MUST verify or use modal-visibility-based scoping. Blocking: false.
- **NR-E2E-PLAN-004** (helper addition): one new helper `create_user_via_api` (≈10 LoC) needed in `tests/e2e/scripts/user_data_setup.py`. Confidence: high (analogous pattern to existing `delete_user`). Blocking: false.
- **NR-E2E-PLAN-005** (toast selector tolerance): `n-message` exact class may shift; plan uses `.filter(has_text="成功")` for tolerance. Reviewer to confirm OK. Blocking: false.

> All Needs Review items are **non-blocking** style/tolerance concerns, consistent with `decision=pass` self-assessment.

---

## 11. Out-of-scope explicitly

- API-only cases (handled by api-plan)
- `is_active` toggle UI behavior
- Department tree filter UI
- Login error / lockout
- Browser-cross compatibility (Chromium only per project config)
- Visual regression / pixel diff
- Performance / load
- Mobile viewport

---

## 12. Self-assessment

| Dimension                         | Status | Note |
|-----------------------------------|--------|------|
| All E2E cases (automation.required=true) covered | ✅ | 6/6 |
| Selectors grounded in source UI                 | ✅ | `index.vue` read; `CrudModal.vue` verification deferred to codegen (NR-E2E-PLAN-002/003) |
| Wait strategy network-driven (no sleep)         | ✅ | All `wait_for_response` or `expect` |
| Cleanup architecture deterministic              | ✅ | `cleanup_users` + defensive immediate registration |
| Auth flow grounded in fact baseline             | ✅ | `logged_in_page` fixture, no token mocking |
| Cross-module dependency (roles)                 | ✅ | TC-USER-103 uses seeded `普通用户`; documented |
| P2 case acknowledged                            | ✅ | TC-USER-105 → NR-E2E-PLAN-001 |
| Blockers                                        | None | |

**Self-decision**: `pass`
**Self-readiness**: `ready`
